sentences.arabic: حَرَصَتِ الْأُمُّ عَلَى تَعْلِيمِ أَبْنَائِهَا الصَّلَاةَ.
sentences.translation: Majka se trudila naučiti djecu namazu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother was keen on teaching her children prayer.

sentences.translation: Naučila je malog sina kako da uzme abdest.
sentences.translationEn: She taught her young son how to perform ablution.

sentences.translation: Potom su klanjali zajedno dok ga je ona posmatrala.
sentences.translationEn: Then they prayed together and she watched over him.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: الصَّلَاةُ عَمُودُ الدِّينِ يَا بُنَيَّ.
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Namaz je stub vjere, sinčiću moj.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: Prayer is the pillar of the religion my son.
